spec_match.rationale: The dynamic styling now uses valid sign()/abs() math: sign() selects the design-system tone, abs() controls bar width and tint strength, and the CSS parses cleanly.

interactive.rationale: The delta slider is fully functional and dynamically updates the rotation and width variables in real time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The blurb promises color, arrow, and bar behavior from one signed delta, and the repaired widget now delivers all three.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers negative, positive, and neutral zero percentage states correctly.

references.rationale: Contains reference links to both the spec and ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: The broken rules were replaced with design-system variables and color-mix(), and the metric delta values no longer rely on inline style attributes.

summary: The delta badge now demonstrates a valid single-source-of-truth CSS implementation: one --delta custom property drives sign-selected color, arrow direction, and abs-sized bar width without malformed CSS or inline style attributes.
